summary: Both PK mini-manifest rows harvested licence-safe: 4 offered candidates per row (Unsplash+Pexels only), best picks staged in final/, full provenance + sha256 from downloaded bytes, per-row + overall contact sheets; 3 downloads recorded rejected (off-region architecture, people/cash handover, hand-dominant portrait); freshness-excluded slugs/hashes not re-offered.

candidates.creator: Martin David
candidates.attribution_text: Photo by Martin David on Unsplash (courtesy credit; attribution not legally required)
candidates.visual_description: Oblique drone aerial of an Australian regional town (Blue Mountains NSW character): low-rise houses, varied rooftops, heavy tree cover, bushland-hill horizon; no landmark skyline, no faces, no readable signage
candidates.text_safe_notes: Even mid-frequency rooftop/tree texture across frame; muted dusk palette sits well under a dark scrim; horizon band top ~12% is calm

candidates.creator: Scotty McDonald
candidates.attribution_text: Photo by Scotty McDonald on Unsplash (courtesy credit; attribution not legally required)
candidates.visual_description: Drone aerial of a Brisbane suburb (Coorparoo character): timber-and-tin houses, unit blocks, school campus, mid-rise cluster right background, smoke plume on horizon
candidates.text_safe_notes: Clear sky top ~25% gives good negative space; lower rooftops busy
warnings: readable building name 'Villanova College' on school facade (never best-pick per rule)
mid-rise towers right background (not a landmark skyline)

candidates.creator: Martin David
candidates.attribution_text: Photo by Martin David on Unsplash (courtesy credit; attribution not legally required)
candidates.visual_description: High oblique aerial of Sydney eastern-suburbs rooftop fabric toward harbour; dense terracotta/white rooftop texture, coastline top right
candidates.text_safe_notes: Dense even texture reads as pattern under scrim; top band hazy water/sky is calmest zone
warnings: faint distant Sydney CBD skyline visible in top-left haze (background, not the subject)

candidates.creator: nenmanz
candidates.attribution_text: Photo by nenmanz on Pexels (courtesy credit; attribution not legally required)
candidates.visual_description: Straight-down drone shot of a Melbourne suburb: tiled hip roofs, backyards, curving streets; calm generic AU suburban pattern, no skyline possible (nadir view)
candidates.text_safe_notes: Very even top-down texture, ideal under scrim; crops cleanly to landscape
warnings: portrait orientation 3024x4032 (row prefers landscape; nadir view crops to landscape without loss of subject)

rejected_reasons: discovery-level: Unsplash+/Getty premium results skipped (e.g. 3af4TaOi5Qw, CMkpq964x9E, zdwmkEU8HRA, VToPcnqTW6c, R-RPNzFhG5k)

candidates.creator: FreeStockPro
candidates.attribution_text: Photo by FreeStockPro on Pexels (courtesy credit; attribution not legally required)
candidates.visual_description: Laser-cut wooden house model and a bunch of keys resting on a printed contract/agreement sheet, flat teal-blue table; no people, no faces
candidates.text_safe_notes: Large flat teal negative space left/bottom-left; document text is template-only (Ukrainian form words, no personal data legible at scale); very clean under dark scrim
warnings: document carries small generic template text + barcode fragment — illegible at post scale, no personal details

candidates.creator: Jakub Żerdzicki
candidates.attribution_text: Photo by Jakub Żerdzicki on Unsplash (courtesy credit; attribution not legally required)
candidates.visual_description: Dark desk scene: document folder with paperwork, sticky notes with house sketches, keys with house-shaped fob, rows of miniature house models; moody office feel, no people
candidates.text_safe_notes: Dark low-key frame is inherently overlay-friendly; busy centre-left where documents sit
warnings: near-duplicate of Pexels 34135038 (same shoot by same photographer)

candidates.creator: Jakub Zerdzicki
candidates.attribution_text: Photo by Jakub Zerdzicki on Pexels (courtesy credit; attribution not legally required)
candidates.visual_description: Same dark desk scene as sCV3336RlIw: folder with documents, house-sketch sticky notes, keys, miniature house models on black table
candidates.text_safe_notes: As sCV3336RlIw; slightly smaller file (heavier compression)
warnings: near-duplicate of Unsplash sCV3336RlIw (same shoot); lower byte weight for same 3000x2001 pixels

candidates.creator: rc.xyz NFT gallery
candidates.attribution_text: Photo by rc.xyz NFT gallery on Unsplash (courtesy credit; attribution not legally required)
candidates.visual_description: Minimal close-up of a single silver key standing on a dark reflective table, soft reflection; no people, no documents
candidates.text_safe_notes: Huge dark negative space all around — best text-overlay surface of the set; lighter on the 'transaction/paperwork' story
warnings: no paperwork/contract element — covers only the 'keys on table' half of the brief

rejected_reasons: rights/constraint: people prominent + EUR cash handover (Pexels 7937717)
constraint: hand-dominant portrait, weak table/paperwork fit (Pexels 7599735)

discovery-level: Unsplash+/Getty premium results skipped (e.g. xhTZG7Ji4gs, nSpdl07d68U, FjXdEgJpF5s, HjZ9R3PWHIc); faces-visible Pexels results skipped undownloaded (7642004, 8293654, 7579206, 8482871)
freshness: rgJ1J8SDEAY + PxiAc1aElFQ + Pexels 8470834 excluded, not re-offered

non_claims: nothing approved/uploaded/inserted; PK visual review is the only deciding act
licence-hold and rights-blocked items recorded, not offered
notes: prior same-day run (different row keys bg_generic_residential_suburb/bg_property_transaction_keys) preserved untouched at prior_run_20260705T1056/ inside the package root
all sha256 values computed from the downloaded bytes; both freshness-excluded hashes checked against every download (no match)
no Wikimedia/Openverse fallback needed — allow-listed Unsplash/Pexels yielded on-brief candidates for both rows
no CC BY / CC BY-SA items encountered in the offered set; nothing on licence hold this run
